translations.Choose which file types to include in th: Choose which file types to include in the vectorization process. Only files with extracted text and chunks will be processed.

translations.ConfigSets define the schema and configu: ConfigSets define the schema and configuration for your SOLR collections. They contain field definitions, analyzers, and other search settings.
translations.Configure large language model (LLM) pro: Configure Large Language Model (LLM) providers for AI-powered features including semantic search, embeddings, and chat.
translations.Configure basic connection settings for: Configure basic connection settings for your SOLR server including authentication and network options. Use the separate ConfigSet and Collection Management dialogs to manage cores and collections.
translations.Configure how database objects are conve: Configure how database objects are converted into vector embeddings for semantic search. Objects are directly vectorized without needing text extraction.
translations.Configure how objects are converted to t: Configure how objects are converted to text before vectorization. These settings affect search quality and context.
translations.Configure parameters for file vectorizat: Configure parameters for file vectorization. This process will generate vector embeddings for all extracted file chunks.
translations.Configure parameters for object vectoriz: Configure parameters for object vectorization. This process will generate vector embeddings for all objects matching your view filters.
translations.Configure which types of data to search: Configure which types of data to search and how many sources to retrieve
translations.Control which object views should be vec: Control which object views should be vectorized to reduce API costs. Only vectorize views that benefit from semantic search.
translations.Control which views and tools the AI can: Control which views and tools the AI can use in this conversation. By default, all agent capabilities are enabled.
